name: Ubiquiti airFiber 11 (no duplexers)
title: Ubiquiti airFiber 11 (no duplexers)
short_description: Full duplex Point-to-Point radio 11 GHz, up to 1.2+ Gbps throughput, max. range 300+ km, INVICTUS™ processor, integrates with airFiber® 11 GHz antennas.
description: Full duplex Point-to-Point radio 11 GHz, up to 1.2+ Gbps throughput, max. range 300+ km, INVICTUS™ processor, integrates with airFiber® 11 GHz antennas.

detailed_description.heading: High-Performance Wireless Backhaul
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 11, part of the Ubiquiti brand's innovative lineup, is a high-performance, radio frequency (RF) product designed for use in the 11 GHz band. Ubiquiti Networks, known for its cutting-edge networking equipment that combines enterprise-level technology with user-friendly interfaces, has tailored the AirFiber 11 to meet the needs of modern, high-capacity broadband networks. This product, without duplexers, signifies a more streamlined version within the AirFiber series, focusing on delivering a pure, high-frequency wireless backhaul solution. The AirFiber 11 is engineered to cater to the demanding requirements of critical data transport in carrier backhaul, building-to-building enterprise use, or public safety applications.

detailed_description.heading: Point-to-Point Connectivity
detailed_description.text: At its core, the AirFiber 11 excels in providing long-distance, point-to-point (PtP) connectivity, offering an alternative to wired backhaul solutions with the flexibility and speed of wireless installation. This capability is particularly valuable in areas where laying physical cables is impractical, expensive, or environmentally sensitive.

detailed_description.heading: Licensed 11 GHz Operation
detailed_description.text: The device operates within the licensed 11 GHz frequency, offering a cleaner RF environment compared to more congested, unlicensed bands. This allows for more stable connections, higher throughput, and reduced interference from other wireless devices. With no duplexers included, the AirFiber 11 is intended for scenarios where either external duplexing solutions are already in place or specific network designs that do not require internal duplexing, providing operators with the flexibility to customize their setups as needed.

detailed_description.heading: High Throughput Capacity
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 11 boasts a high throughput capacity, capable of delivering up to 1.2+ Gbps of real data transfer, making it an ideal solution for backhaul demands of today's intensive bandwidth applications. Its superior performance is also supported by Ubiquiti's proprietary airFiber technology, which incorporates innovative signal processing techniques to maximize speed and efficiency over long distances.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Design and Management
detailed_description.text: Design-wise, the AirFiber 11 features a robust, weather-resistant construction, ensuring reliable operation in diverse environmental conditions. This durability, coupled with its high performance, makes the AirFiber 11 a trusted choice for deployments that require consistent, uninterrupted service. Furthermore, the AirFiber 11 integrates seamlessly with the Ubiquiti Network Management System (UNMS), allowing for easy setup, monitoring, and management of the device remotely. This centralized management platform enhances the overall user experience by providing a comprehensive view of the network's performance, facilitating timely adjustments and optimizations to maintain optimal operation.

detailed_description.heading: Summary
detailed_description.text: In summary, the AirFiber 11 from Ubiquiti Networks represents a powerful, flexible solution for high-capacity wireless backhaul. Without the inclusion of duplexers, it already offers network designers and operators the versatility to deploy tailored, high-performance wireless connectivity solutions in a variety of scenarios, all while benefiting from the reliability, efficiency, and ease of use that Ubiquiti products are known for.

detailed_description.heading: With Duplexers Included
detailed_description.text: The choice between the AirFiber 11 without duplexers and with duplexers included depends on the specific requirements of the network deployment, including factors such as budget, desired level of customization, and the complexity of the RF environment. For networks needing customized duplexing solutions or where cost considerations are paramount, the version without duplexers may be preferable. Conversely, for operators seeking ease of installation and an integrated solution optimized for immediate deployment, the model with duplexers included offers a compelling option.

detailed_description.heading: Convenience with Duplexers
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 11 models equipped with duplexers offer a more convenient and straightforward setup process. Having duplexers included eliminates the need for additional external components, making installation quicker and reducing the complexity of the configuration.

detailed_description.heading: Performance with Duplexers
detailed_description.text: Duplexers included with the device are specifically designed to complement the AirFiber 11's hardware, ensuring optimal performance. This integration can lead to better signal isolation, reduced interference, and enhanced overall system efficiency, particularly in dual-polarity applications. In addidtion, with the added low‑band duplexer or high‑band duplexer, the airFiber AF-11 is capable to use single (SISO) or bonded (MIMO) channels, depending on your specific licensing requirements. The AF-11 also features different channel widths to suit your deployment needs, and you can independently configure TX and RX channel frequencies

detailed_description.heading: Out-of-the-Box Solution
detailed_description.text: For network operators looking for an immediate, out-of-the-box solution, the AirFiber 11 with built-in duplexers provides a streamlined approach. It's ideal for deployments that can benefit from the standard duplexing configurations provided by Ubiquiti, offering a balance of convenience and performance without the need for external components.
